premium_1.name: Chef's Grilled Salmon Plate
steps: Marinate the salmon fillet with olive oil, fresh thyme, sea salt and pepper. Let it rest at room temperature for 10 minutes.
Trim the hard ends of the asparagus. Arrange them on a baking tray with the cherry tomatoes and lightly oil.
In a preheated cast-iron pan, sear the salmon skin-side down for 4 minutes, then flip and cook for 3 more minutes.
Roast the vegetables at 200°C for 12 minutes. Combine the salmon and vegetables on a large, elegant plate and drizzle with freshly squeezed lemon juice.

premium_2.name: Truffle Mushroom Artisan Pasta
steps: Boil the fresh tagliatelle in plenty of salted boiling water for 3-4 minutes. Reserve half a small cup of the cooking water and drain the pasta.
Melt the butter in a wide pan. Sauté the thinly sliced garlic and mushrooms over high heat.
Once the mushrooms release their water, add the cream, truffle oil and the reserved pasta water. Simmer for 2 minutes until the sauce slightly thickens.
Add the pasta to the sauce, bind with parmesan cheese. Sprinkle with fresh parsley and serve hot.

premium_3.name: Berry Fit Cheesecake
steps: For the base: Process the oat flour, almonds and pitted dates in a food processor. Press the mixture into the base of a springform pan.
For the filling: Whisk the labneh, strained yogurt and honey until smooth. Add the eggs one by one, mixing gently.
Pour the filling over the base. Bake in a preheated oven at 160°C for 35-40 minutes, placing a dish of water on the oven floor.
After the cheesecake cools, rest it in the fridge for at least 4 hours. Before serving, decorate the top with fresh berries.

premium_4.name: Green Revitalizing Detox
steps: Wash the apple, cucumber and celery stalks in plenty of water and chop into large pieces.
Pass the chopped vegetables, along with the spinach, peeled ginger and lemon juice, through a juicer or a powerful blender.
If using a blender, strain the mixture through a fine sieve or cheesecloth to obtain a smooth juice.
Pour your detox juice into a stylish tall glass full of ice. Garnish with fresh mint leaves and a lemon slice and drink immediately.
